description:
ICICI Lombard's Health AdvantEdge Apex Plus  Plan offers a robust, comprehensive, and affordable health insurance solution. 

Now, ICICI Lombard will only offer the New Health AdvantEdge 2024 plan. In this video, we have discussed the features, benefits, waiting periods as well as compared it to the old ICICI Lombard Health AdvantEdge .

WATCH THE VIDEO FOR MORE DETAILS : -
✅  To buy insurance policies, click here - https://hareepatti.com/contact-us/
